content.subtitle: Assistant Director & Filmmaker
content.description: Crafting cinematic stories that inspire through visual storytelling

content.label: Let's Collaborate
content.title: Have a vision? Let's bring it to life.
content.description: Whether it's a commercial, documentary, or narrative film â€” every great project starts with a conversation.

content.text1: I'm Ahmed Hany Abuzenada â€” an award-winning Saudi filmmaker and assistant director passionate about making a change through storytelling.
content.text2: My work sits at the intersection of technical precision and emotional resonance. Every frame serves the story, every cut feels intentional.

content.text1: Cinema is more than entertainment â€” it's a mirror reflecting our shared humanity. Every project begins with: what truth are we trying to reveal?
content.text2: I approach each production with meticulous attention to detail and deep respect for the collaborative nature of filmmaking.

content.text: Every frame is an opportunity to reveal something true about the world we live in.
content.author: Ahmed Hany Abuzenada

content.label: Get in Touch
content.title: Let's create together
content.description: Whether you're looking for an assistant director or a creative collaborator â€” I'd love to hear from you.

projects.title: Trucage
projects.description:
- Grand prix winner for the documentary category at VII Golden Baklava international student film festival in Turkey, 2022.


- Golden Palm for the unique documentary subject at Saudi Film Festival, 2023


- Got the 2nd rank out of 108 other international short films according to the audience vote in liftoff global film festival in UK, 2021.


-Honorable mention at student world impact film festival U.S, 2022


-Excellence trophy in the 2nd edition of the annual media forum in Egypt â€œfaces of Egyptâ€, Sept 2021.


- Official selection in the international competition of festival Internacional de cinema escolar de Alvorada in brazil, dec 2021.


- Finalist in Meihodo international youth visual media festival in US, 2021


- Finalist in the 5th international folklore film festival in India, Jan 2022.


- Official selection in international Alexandria short film festival in Egypt, Feb 2022.


- Official selection in Visions Cairo Egyptian short Film festival, 2023.


- Official selection in Saudi film festival, may 2023.


-Official selection in Africa international film festival in Nigeria, 2022.


-Official selection in International interuniversity film festival in India, 2022.



- Official selection in Ekurhuleni international film festival in south Africa, 2022.


- 3 Awards winner in MSA star awards, 2021 (Best Film, Best directing, and best editing)


A short documentary provides the realties of stunt profession featuring four professional stunts performers in Egyptian film industry as well as highlighting the importance of the stunt industry during the film production or other mediums, showing how integral stunt performer's roles are in producing content and showing the complexities of the stunt profession.

projects.title: Trucage Trailer
projects.description: Official trailer for Trucage, the award-winning short documentary about stunt performers in the Egyptian film industry.
